name: Police Emergency
description: For any police-related emergency, crime, or law and order issue.

name: Fire Brigade
description: For fire emergencies and fire-related rescue operations.

name: Ambulance / Medical Emergency
description: For medical emergencies, ambulance service, and hospital transport.

name: National Emergency Number
description: Unified emergency number for police, fire, and ambulance services across India.

name: Women Helpline
description: For women in distress — domestic violence, harassment, abuse, and safety concerns.

name: Child Helpline (CHILDLINE)
description: For children in need of care and protection — abuse, trafficking, child labour.

name: Senior Citizen Helpline
description: For senior citizens facing abuse, neglect, or needing assistance.

name: Anti-Corruption Helpline (CVC)
description: To report corruption in government departments and public services.

name: Cyber Crime Helpline
description: For reporting cyber crimes including online fraud, hacking, and identity theft.

name: Consumer Helpline
description: For consumer complaints, product grievances, and unfair trade practices.

name: Railway Enquiry
description: For railway ticket booking, PNR status, train schedules, and general enquiry.

name: Road Accident Emergency
description: For road accidents on National Highways — towing, medical aid, police assistance.

name: Disaster Management (NDMA)
description: For natural disasters — floods, earthquakes, cyclones, and disaster relief coordination.

name: Gas Leak / LPG Emergency
description: For reporting gas leaks and LPG cylinder-related emergencies.

name: Electricity Complaint
description: For power outages, electrical hazards, and electricity billing complaints.

name: Blood Bank (Red Cross)
description: For blood donation and blood requirement queries through Indian Red Cross Society.

name: Mental Health Helpline (NIMHANS)
description: For mental health support, counseling, and psychological distress.

name: RTI Helpline
description: For Right to Information queries and filing RTI applications.

name: Income Tax Helpline
description: For income tax queries, e-filing support, and tax-related grievances.

name: EPFO Helpline
description: For EPF balance, withdrawal, transfer, and provident fund queries.
